## Summary

## Module(s) affected

- [ ] vpc
- [ ] iam
- [ ] eks
- [ ] Planned module (specify):

- [ ] Documentation only

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / module capability
- [ ] Breaking change (requires a major version note in CHANGELOG.md)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Checklist

- [ ] `terraform fmt -recursive` passes
- [ ] `terraform validate` passes for all changed modules
- [ ] `tflint` and `tfsec` pass (or findings are justified inline with `#tfsec:ignore` and a reason)
- [ ] `README.md` for the affected module is updated (variables, outputs, examples)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] If this changes a documented default (NAT strategy, IAM scope, subnet sizing, etc.), the trade-off is called out below
